proposed_domain: Andean chuño potato freeze-thaw-trample preservation (5-day cyclic freeze + day-trample + dry; cells rupture and water mechanically squeezed; decade-stable product)

closest_prior_match.verdict: DISTINCT — fresco is time-window carbonation (CL parameter commit); chuño is multi-phase cyclic compression. Different temporal pattern (one-shot vs N-cycle).
